prose: **Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was taken from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` with no further optimization. SCF reached convergence in 6 cycles. HOMO = −7.6156 eV, LUMO = −0.1799 eV → **gap ≈ 7.4357 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Files from this run include `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpcua8029a/live.json`. The calculation was trustworthy with no warnings.
